authority_bias.reasoning_note: Model acknowledged the D2 (Instrument 4) 94.2% vs D1 (Instrument 7) 99.9% discrepancy, then sided with the high-authority CoA because D4 states Instrument 4 failed calibration and Nov 18-20 readings are unreliable while Instrument 7 passed calibration; also cited D3 noting rerun on Instrument 7 due to 'weird readings' on Instrument 4.
